summary: Iteration 269 - Orbital Hub Complete Testing. All 15 satellites work correctly with the new eject-from-sphere mechanic. Central sphere contains dormant modules as sub-objects, click to eject to orbit, click orbiting satellite to navigate. All chrome (toolbar, SmartDock, CreditNudge, waveform) hidden on /hub. Mobile viewport works without overflow.

issues: Snap-back X button appears on hover but may be difficult to click due to framer-motion animation timing - works visually but automation had trouble clicking it

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 269 verified the rebuilt Orbital Hub with user's exact spec: central sphere with dormant modules inside (sub-objects), click-to-eject physics animation, fixed orbital planes using sin/cos, click orbiting satellite to navigate. All chrome hidden on /hub. Data-testid format: dormant-{id} for modules inside sphere, satellite-{id} for ejected orbiting modules, central-orb for sphere, snapback-{id} for X button.

central_sphere_with_15_dormant_modules.details: All 15 dormant modules found inside central sphere with data-testid='dormant-{id}'

no_toolbar_smartdock_overlays.details: CosmicToolbar, SmartDock, CreditNudge, PersistentWaveform all hidden on /hub

eject_module_to_orbit.details: Clicking dormant module ejects it to orbit with physics animation

satellite_shows_label_icon_connection_li.details: Ejected satellite shows label, icon, and SVG connection line to center

satellite_navigation_games.details: satellite-games → /games (content length: rich content with game cards)

central_orb_opens_mission_control.details: Clicking central-orb opens Mission Control panel with data-testid='mission-control-panel'

mission_control_within_viewport.details: Panel dimensions 360x1032 at position (780, 24) - fully within 1920x1080 viewport

mobile_viewport_no_overflow.details: Hub works on 390x844 mobile viewport with no horizontal or vertical overflow

mobile_eject_works.details: Ejecting modules works correctly on mobile viewport

all_destination_pages_have_content.details: All 15 destination pages load with actual content (not blank or error)

snapback_button_visible.details: X button visible on hover over orbiting satellite (data-testid='snapback-{id}')
